productDisplayName: Baggit Women Voodoo Viva Grey Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 9.5 cmCrafted from genuine leatherette with a fold over flap detail held in place by a concealed magnetic buttonOne main compartment with  zippered separatorFour card holders and a pocketA zippered compartment on the flap and a zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
